emails.subject: Letter agreement
emails.body: Letter agreement Gentlemen, I've revised paragraph 5 to reflect our discussion. Also, I made a change to paragraph 7 to include technical bulletins per Mitch's request which we did not discuss on our call. Please let me know if you have any questions or comments. Kay 713 345 7566

emails.subject: FW: Letter agreement
emails.body: Stamp of approval. Mike J. Miller is the right guy from ENA to sign. Please let me know if you have any trouble getting a signature from any of the parties. Thanks, Mitch Forwarded by Mitch Robinson/Corp/Enron on 12/13/2000 08:06 AM DeKrey Lynn <Lynn.DeKrey@swpc.siemens.com> on 12/12/2000 04:58:08 PM
